title: 60 Ticks - Modpack
description: The Mod Pack For 60 Ticks. 60 Ticks is a mod based of 60 seconds that makes it so you need to grab supplies within 60 seconds and go into the bunker and survive for as long as you can
body:
![60TicksLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d22425a34332b37d1974c48e6facc357b4e87661.png)
# Description ---------------------------
- The Modpack For 60 Ticks. 60 Ticks is a mod based of 60 seconds that makes it so you need to grab supplies within 60 seconds and go into the bunker and survive for as long as you can
- **This modpack is recommended for Hardcore Mode**
- If you see just want to see the mod, click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/60-ticks)
- **_This mod is in early development, expect changes and some bugs_**
